name: gmail-triage-plugin
description: Triage Gmail into urgent, needs reply, waiting, and FYI queues with metadata-only Telvine telemetry.

interface.shortDescription: Prioritize Gmail threads and extract reply queues.
interface.longDescription: An opinionated Gmail triage starter for ranking urgent messages, extracting follow-ups, and preparing safe reply queues without sending message content to telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Triage my inbox and rank what needs attention.
Find messages that need a reply this week.
